items.text: Hi Eliza, Your interlibrary loan book, "Coastal Wetland Ecology," arrived from State College and is held at the Wilkes Library service desk. Please pick it up by Friday, June 5. A $2.00 handling fee will apply at the counter. Thanks, Lin (ILL Clerk)

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Eliza do?

options.D: Renew the title for two weeks

questions.explanation: The email tells Eliza to pick up the loan book by Friday, June 5.

questions.stem: What can be inferred if Eliza arrives at the desk without funds?

options.A: She will be allowed to read the book onsite only
options.B: She may be unable to complete the pickup that day
options.C: She will lose her interlibrary borrowing privileges
options.D: She must wait for a refund from State College

questions.explanation: Because the email says a $2.00 fee applies at the counter, arriving without funds implies she may not be able to complete the pickup.

items.text: Hi Daniel, Your campus parking permit for the fall term is ready at the Transportation Services office in Hadley Hall, Room 108. Please bring your student ID and pick it up before Friday, August 20, at 4:00 PM. Best, S. Romero

questions.stem: According to the email, where should Daniel go?
questions.explanation: The email directs Daniel to Room 108 in Hadley Hall.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Daniel's permit?

options.A: It cannot be transferred to another student
options.B: It includes free shuttle access for one week
options.C: It must be renewed every academic term
options.D: It may be forfeited if not collected on time

questions.explanation: The strict deadline of Friday at 4:00 PM implies the permit may be forfeited if Daniel does not collect it on time.

items.text: Dear advisees, Owing to a department review, my office hours are temporarily relocated to Beasley Hall, Room 305, this week. Please drop by Tuesday or Thursday from 1:30 PM to 3:00 PM. Regular hours resume next Monday. Best, Dr. Patel

questions.stem: According to the email, when may students visit Dr. Patel this week?

options.A: Monday morning at the regular room
options.D: Tuesday or Thursday between 1:30 and 3:00 PM

questions.explanation: The email states office hours run Tuesday or Thursday from 1:30 PM to 3:00 PM.

questions.stem: The word "relocated" in the email is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: The email says hours are moved to Beasley Hall, Room 305, so "relocated" means moved to a different room.

items.text: Dear advisees, My office hours are moved to Conway Hall, Room 12, for the rest of this week. Drop-in slots are Wednesday from 10:00 AM to noon. A $3.50 printing fee applies for advising worksheets. Best, Professor Imani

questions.stem: According to the email, what is the new location of office hours?
questions.explanation: The email directly states the new location is Conway Hall, Room 12.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who picks up an advising worksheet?

options.A: The student may sign up for a private slot
options.B: The student must pay a small fee at the desk
options.C: The student will receive a free orientation packet
options.D: The student should email Professor Imani first

questions.explanation: Because the email notes a $3.50 printing fee for advising worksheets, the student must pay a small fee.
